title: St.George Forane Church, Edathua
tagline: St.George Forane Church, Edathua — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St.George Forane Church, Edathua is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Edathua, also known as Edathua Valiapally is a parish of Syro-Malabar Catholic Church located in Edathua, India. Saint George is the patron saint of the church. It is one of the pilgrimage centre in Kerala located at Edathua on the bank of Pamba River in Alappuzha District, Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Edathua
topPlaces.description: Edathua is a small village in Kuttanad, Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It is located 12 km from Thiruvalla city center, National Highway 183 and the Thiruvalla railway station.

topPlaces.name: Pandankary
topPlaces.description: Pandankary is a hamlet in Edathua Panchayat, Kuttanadu Taluk, Alapuzha (Alleppey) District, Kerala, India. Being a water-logged area (below sea-level), Pandankary people have to brace the flooding during monsoon season, which happens at least once a year.

topPlaces.name: Chakkulathukavu Temple
topPlaces.description: Chakkulathukavu Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Durga. Situated near Thiruvalla in Neerattupuram, Thalavady Panchayat, Alappuzha District, Kerala, India, it is one of the most renowned temples in the state.

topPlaces.name: Neerattupuram
topPlaces.description: Neerattupuram is a place in Kuttanad, Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It is a part of Thalavady Grama Panchayat, situated near the junction of Alappuzha, Pathanamthitta and Kottayam districts, at the confluence of Pamba and Manimala rivers.

topPlaces.name: Niranam
topPlaces.description: Niranam is a village in Thiruvalla, Kerala, India. It was a port in ancient Kerala, on the confluence of the Manimala and Pamba River.

topPlaces.name: Payippad
topPlaces.description: Payippad is a village in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is situated about 4 km north of Harippad (the nearest town) on the Harippad, Veeyapuram road.

topPlaces.name: Mithrakary
topPlaces.description: Mithrakary is a small village in Kerala, India. It is located in Muttar Panchayat in Kuttanadu Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Mampuzhakkary
topPlaces.description: Mampuzhakkary is a village in the Kuttanad region of Alappuzha District in South India. It is located near the Pampa River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St.George Forane Church, Edathua?
faq.a: The best time to visit St.George Forane Church, Edathua is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St.George Forane Church, Edathua?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St.George Forane Church, Edathua?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St.George Forane Church, Edathua at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St.George Forane Church, Edathua?
faq.a: Stays in St.George Forane Church, Edathua start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St.George Forane Church, Edathua?
faq.a: The top attractions are Edathua, Pandankary, Chakkulathukavu Temple, Neerattupuram, Niranam.
